title: sumanize
subtitle: Content Summarization Tool
description: A Gemini wrapper that processes long-form articles or documents and delivers clear, concise, or richly descriptive summaries tailored to your needs, for rapid understanding, deep dives, or quick overviews.

title: vizum
subtitle: Image Processing Tool
description: Convert images to different formats, smartly crop corners, compress for reduced file size, upscale photos with advanced AI enhancement, and extract dominant color palettes, all in one streamlined tool.

title: cumauto
subtitle: Commit/PR Automation Tool
description: CLI tool that looks at your code changes and automatically makes commit messages and PR descriptions. The name comes from blending 'cum' (Latin for 'with') and 'auto' for easy commit automation.

title: coinsavor
subtitle: Food Budgeting App
description: Mobile-first gamified food budgeting app that provides you randomized daily meal plans, streak tracking, and monthly spending limits so your broke ass don't get broker.
